creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port jp-mew-1.70 (japanese/mew).

	Current modifications is

		(1) Change dir installation with install-info.
		(2) Slave to japanese/mew

	Add,Delete and Update files are respecively

	[Add] :
		files/DEINSTALL.tmpl
		files/INSTALL.tmpl
		files/MH-postproc.jp.tmpl
		files/MH-postproc.tmpl
		files/dot.emacs.jp
		files/dot.mh_profile.jp
		files/scan.form.jp
		files/user-install.tmpl
		patches/patch-ac
		patches/patch-ad
		patches/patch-ae
		patches/patch-af

	[Delete] :
		files/MH-postproc
		files/user-install
		pkg/DEINSTALL
		pkg/INSTALL

	[Update] :
		files/aliases
		files/dot.emacs
		files/md5
		files/scan.form
		patches/patch-aa
		patches/patch-ab
		pkg/DESCR
		pkg/PLIST

	I put the diff from ports-current(japanese/mew) in "Fix:".
